title: Codex Relay Capability Profile
problem: Codex bridge modes can expose official-like client features, but codex-helper does not yet provide a relay-agnostic capability profile, active probes, or mode recommendations that distinguish client exposure from upstream support.

continue_policy.notes: Completed with static profile, bounded probes, admin diagnostics, conservative patch-mode recommendations, docs, changelog, and full core package gate evidence. Split WebSocket relay, remote compaction v2, TUI/GUI wrappers, or paid hosted-tool probes into follow-on lanes.
